summary: Hyunwoo visits the Emperor to present a souvenir from the Eastern Continent, revealing that he successfully traversed the impassable barrier with the help of a dragon. By fulfilling a condition set by the dragon, Hyunwoo manages to secure the Emperor's signature on a document, triggering a continental integration quest. He then embarks on a journey to gather consent from various leaders, including Tengi's father, Hugo, while encountering other legendary creatures and challenges along the way.
key_moments: Hyunwoo gifts the Emperor rare liquor from the Eastern Continent.
The Emperor signs a document that clears the Continental Integration quest.
Hyunwoo initiates a mission to gather consent from chiefs, leading him to reunite with Hugo and encounter other magical beings.
